description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a vibrant rainbow theme, featuring horizontal stripes of purple, blue, green, yellow, orange, and red icing piped in a rosette pattern around the sides. The top of the cake displays a spiral of the same rainbow colors, creating a visually striking effect. A large wedge has been cut from the cake, revealing multiple internal layers that match the exterior colors, each separated by thin layers of icing. The cake sits on a flat, polygonal blue base, which appears to be a cake board or stand. The texture of the icing is soft and piped, with a matte finish and visible swirls. There are no candles or additional decorations present, and the cake is not enclosed in any container.
description: A round, single-tier rainbow cake with piped rosette icing and a spiral top, displayed on a blue cake board with a visible cut wedge showing colorful internal layers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cut wedge, revealing the colorful internal layers and piped rainbow rosettes on the exterior.
description_view_1: Side view with the cut wedge on the left, highlighting the horizontal rainbow layers and the piped rosette texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cake fully intact, displaying the continuous rainbow rosette pattern and spiral top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cut wedge on the right, again showing the piped rosettes and the cake's layered structure.
